meta.title: Report Builder Practice Questions
meta.description: Spoken practice prompts with model answers for Cambridge B2/C1 report writing. Each answer demonstrates the key report phrases with banner triggers.

school-facilities.question: Tell me about a facility at your school that you think could be improved

answer.text: The aim of this report is to assess the school library and suggest improvements based on student feedback.
answer.phrase: The aim of this report is to assess
answer.label: Stating the aim

answer.text: The relevant information was obtained through a survey of over 150 students across all year groups.
answer.phrase: The relevant information was obtained through
answer.label: Methodology

answer.text: It is generally agreed that the library provides a useful quiet study environment.
answer.phrase: It is generally agreed that
answer.label: Neutral observation

answer.text: However, one major concern expressed by students is that the library closes at four o'clock, which makes it impossible to study after school clubs.
answer.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by students is that
answer.label: Main problem

answer.text: This is mainly due to the fact that there is insufficient staffing to keep it open longer.
answer.phrase: This is mainly due to the fact that
answer.label: Cause

answer.text: One key recommendation would be to extend opening hours until at least five-thirty on weekdays.
answer.phrase: One key recommendation would be to
answer.label: Primary recommendation

answer.text: Taking everything into account, these improvements would benefit students significantly and improve academic performance.
answer.phrase: Taking everything into account,
answer.label: Conclusion

school-facilities.question: Describe a survey you carried out about school facilities

answer.text: This report provides an overview of the school's main facilities, focusing on what works well and what requires improvement.

answer.label: Stating the aim

answer.text: The information was collected through a short questionnaire distributed to over two hundred students.
answer.phrase: The information was collected through
answer.label: Methodology

answer.text: By far the best aspect of the school is the recently upgraded IT equipment, which students praised consistently.
answer.phrase: By far the best aspect of
answer.label: Highlight

answer.text: A significant concern amongst students was that the sports hall is unavailable during lunch breaks.
answer.phrase: A significant concern amongst students was that
answer.label: Main problem

answer.text: As a result, many students have no suitable space to exercise or relax during the school day.
answer.phrase: As a result,
answer.label: Effect

answer.text: I would strongly recommend opening the sports hall at lunchtimes with a simple teacher supervision rota.
answer.phrase: I would strongly recommend
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: In conclusion, the facilities work well overall, but access to sports and study spaces needs urgent improvement.
answer.phrase: In conclusion,
answer.label: Conclusion

answer.label: Main problem

answer.phrase: In order to address this, it is essential that
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: If this change is made, it would demonstrate that the school takes student wellbeing seriously.
answer.phrase: If this change is made, it would
answer.label: Expected outcome

answer.text: To sum up, while many aspects of the school are commendable, targeted investment in key areas is long overdue.
answer.phrase: To sum up,
answer.label: Conclusion

answer.label: Stating the aim

answer.text: This report is based on feedback from the fifteen students who participated in March.

answer.label: Methodology

answer.label: Highlight

answer.phrase: This is mainly due to the fact that

answer.label: Conclusion

exchange-programme.question: Describe the most valuable thing students can gain from a school exchange

answer.text: This report seeks to examine the educational value of international exchange programmes for secondary school students.

answer.label: Stating the aim

answer.label: Methodology

answer.phrase: It is generally agreed that
answer.label: Neutral observation

answer.text: One key recommendation would be to improve communication between the school and host families before departure.
answer.phrase: One key recommendation would be to
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.text: In conclusion, exchange programmes represent an invaluable educational experience that should be continued and expanded.

answer.label: Conclusion

answer.text: The relevant information was obtained through a youth survey with one hundred and twenty responses.

answer.label: Methodology

answer.label: General view

answer.phrase: However, one major concern expressed by teenagers was that

answer.label: Consequence

answer.phrase: In order to improve participation, it would be advisable to
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.label: Conclusion

sports-facilities.question: What changes would encourage more young people to use a local sports centre?

answer.text: This report provides an overview of the sports centre's current provision and what improvements would attract more young users.

answer.label: Balanced view

answer.text: By far the worst aspect was the opening hours, which close at six o'clock and make after-school visits impossible.

answer.label: Main problem

answer.text: This is mainly due to the fact that staffing costs prevent later opening without additional funding.

answer.label: Cause

answer.phrase: I would strongly recommend
answer.label: Key recommendation

answer.text: To sum up, the evidence clearly shows that accessible, affordable facilities are essential for improving youth fitness.
answer.phrase: To sum up,
answer.label: Conclusion

answer.label: General view

answer.label: Recommendation

answer.label: Conclusion

school-trip.question: Describe an educational visit you organised or took part in

answer.label: Stating the aim

library-services.question: What digital resources should libraries offer students?

answer.label: Stating the aim

answer.label: Balanced view

answer.phrase: However, a significant concern amongst students was
answer.label: Key problem

answer.phrase: This is mainly due to the fact that
answer.label: Cause

answer.phrase: To improve this, it would be a good idea to
answer.label: Recommendation

answer.label: Conclusion

answer.label: Stating the aim

answer.label: Positive finding

answer.label: Conclusion

answer.label: Recommendation

answer.label: Conclusion

environmental-initiative.question: How could schools do more to promote environmental awareness?

answer.label: Stating the aim

answer.label: Recommendation

answer.label: Supporting recommendation

answer.label: Conclusion
